# van der Waals
#==============

MM3:UNIT SIGMA angstrom
MM3:UNIT EPSILON kcalmol
MM3:SCALE 1 0.0
MM3:SCALE 2 0.0
MM3:SCALE 3 1.0

# ---------------------------------------------
# KEY      ffatype  SIGMA  EPSILON  ONLYPAULI
# ---------------------------------------------

MM3:PARS      He     1.530   0.026      0
